description: Create comprehensive evidence summary figure comparing mitochondrial vs peroxisomal evidence for Acat1
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 12))
fig.suptitle('Evidence Assessment: Drosophila Acat1 (Q9W3N9) Peroxisome Localization\n(GO:0005777, ISM from PMID:22758915)', 
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# Panel A: Evidence comparison for mitochondrion vs peroxisome
ax1 = axes[0, 0]
categories = ['Mitochondrion\n(GO:0005739)', 'Peroxisome\n(GO:0005777)']
evidence_types = ['HDA (Experimental)', 'IBA (Phylogenetic)', 'ISM (Computational)']
colors = ['#2ecc71', '#3498db', '#e74c3c']

# Mitochondrion: HDA=1, IBA=1, ISM=1; Peroxisome: HDA=0, IBA=0, ISM=1
mito_vals = [1, 1, 1]
perox_vals = [0, 0, 1]

x = np.arange(len(categories))
width = 0.25

for i, (ev_type, color) in enumerate(zip(evidence_types, colors)):
    vals = [mito_vals[i], perox_vals[i]]
    bars = ax1.bar(x + (i - 1) * width, vals, width, label=ev_type, color=color, alpha=0.8, edgecolor='black')

ax1.set_ylabel('Evidence Present (1=Yes, 0=No)', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_title('A. Evidence Support by GO Term', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_xticks(x)
ax1.set_xticklabels(categories, fontsize=11)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 1.4)
ax1.legend(fontsize=9, loc='upper right')
ax1.set_yticks([0, 1])
ax1.set_yticklabels(['No', 'Yes'])

# Panel B: PTS1 C-terminal comparison
ax2 = axes[0, 1]
proteins = ['Dmel Acat1\n(Q9W3N9)', 'Human ACAT1\n(P24752)', 'Dmel ScpX\n(Q24506)', 'Yeast POT1\n(P27796)']
c_terms = ['-EKL', '-QKL', '-SKL', '-IKE']
pts1_scores = [3, 3, 6, 2]  # Out of 6
bar_colors = ['#e74c3c', '#e74c3c', '#2ecc71', '#e74c3c']

bars = ax2.barh(proteins, pts1_scores, color=bar_colors, alpha=0.8, edgecolor='black')
ax2.set_xlabel('PTS1 Score (max 6)', fontsize=11)
ax2.set_title('B. C-terminal PTS1 Signal Scoring', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xlim(0, 7)
ax2.axvline(x=5, color='green', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Canonical threshold')

# Add C-terminal text to bars
for bar, ct in zip(bars, c_terms):
    ax2.text(bar.get_width() + 0.1, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2, 
             ct, va='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

ax2.legend(fontsize=9)

# Panel C: N-terminal MTS characteristics
ax3 = axes[1, 0]
proteins_mts = ['Dmel Acat1\n(first 30 aa)', 'Human ACAT1\n(first 33 aa, known MTS)']
pos_charges = [6, 7]
neg_charges = [1, 2]
net_charges = [5, 5]

x_mts = np.arange(len(proteins_mts))
width_mts = 0.25

ax3.bar(x_mts - width_mts, pos_charges, width_mts, label='Positive (R+K+H)', color='#3498db', alpha=0.8, edgecolor='black')
ax3.bar(x_mts, neg_charges, width_mts, label='Negative (D+E)', color='#e74c3c', alpha=0.8, edgecolor='black')
ax3.bar(x_mts + width_mts, net_charges, width_mts, label='Net charge', color='#2ecc71', alpha=0.8, edgecolor='black')

ax3.set_ylabel('Count / Charge', fontsize=11)
ax3.set_title('C. N-terminal MTS Properties', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax3.set_xticks(x_mts)
ax3.set_xticklabels(proteins_mts, fontsize=10)
ax3.legend(fontsize=9)

# Panel D: Summary table
ax4 = axes[1, 1]
ax4.axis('off')
table_data = [
    ['Feature', 'Mitochondrion', 'Peroxisome'],
    ['Experimental evidence', 'HDA (LOPIT)', 'None'],
    ['Phylogenetic evidence', 'IBA', 'None'],
    ['Computational prediction', 'ISM', 'ISM only'],
    ['Targeting signal', 'MTS (N-term, +5)', '-EKL (non-canonical)'],
    ['Functional context', 'Ketolysis, AA catab.', 'None in Drosophila'],
    ['Ortholog localization', 'Mito (human ACAT1)', 'Not peroxisomal'],
    ['', '', ''],
    ['VERDICT', 'SUPPORTED', 'OVER-ANNOTATED'],
]

table = ax4.table(cellText=table_data, loc='center', cellLoc='center',
                  colWidths=[0.35, 0.32, 0.33])
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(10)
table.scale(1, 1.5)

# Style header row
for j in range(3):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#34495e')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')
    
# Style verdict row
for j in range(3):
    table[8, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)
    if j == 1:
        table[8, j].set_facecolor('#d5f4e6')
    elif j == 2:
        table[8, j].set_facecolor('#fadbd8')

ax4.set_title('D. Evidence Summary', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.95])
plt.savefig('evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence summary figure saved.")
